category_sources: source_facts.description says iblinter is a linter tool for Interface Builder; official README says it normalizes .xib and .storyboard files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/IBDecodable/IBLinter uses the heading IBLinter.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface for IBLinter.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/IBDecodable/IBLinter, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Interface Builder linting for .xib and .storyboard files.
